summary: After defeating the 2nd Prince Edward, Kang Hyunwoo is summoned by the Emperor to be rewarded for his actions. The Emperor grants him the title of Viscount and then promotes him to a True Knight of Kione, facilitating his 3rd class advancement. Finally, the Emperor tasks Kang Hyunwoo with a new quest to locate the missing Duke Blake, while outside observers continue to speculate about the player's mysterious identity.
key_moments: Kang Hyunwoo is granted the title of First Viscount by the Emperor.
The Emperor promotes Kang Hyunwoo to a True Knight of Kione and grants him his 3rd class advancement.
The Emperor assigns Kang Hyunwoo a quest to find the former commander, Duke Blake.
